title: pgstat — Vacuum & Bloat Overview
description: Fleet genelinde dead tuple orani sirali. Hangi instance'in hangi tablosu vacuum gerektiriyor — tek bakista. Click → Instance Detail.

list.name: service_group
list.query: select distinct service_group from control.instance_inventory where service_group is not null order by 1
list.label: Service Group

targets.rawSql: with latest as (select instance_pk, max(sample_ts) as ts from fact.pg_table_stat_delta group by instance_pk) select coalesce(sum(t.n_dead_tup_estimate), 0) as value from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t join latest l on l.instance_pk = t.instance_pk and l.ts = t.sample_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = t.instance_pk where (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

with latest as (select instance_pk, max(sample_ts) as ts from fact.pg_table_stat_delta group by instance_pk) select coalesce(sum(t.n_live_tup_estimate), 0) as value from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t join latest l on l.instance_pk = t.instance_pk and l.ts = t.sample_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = t.instance_pk where (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

with latest as (select instance_pk, max(sample_ts) as ts from fact.pg_table_stat_delta group by instance_pk) select round(100.0 * sum(t.n_dead_tup_estimate)::numeric / nullif(sum(t.n_dead_tup_estimate + t.n_live_tup_estimate), 0), 1) as value from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t join latest l on l.instance_pk = t.instance_pk and l.ts = t.sample_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = t.instance_pk where (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select count(*) as value from fact.pg_progress_snapshot p join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = p.instance_pk where p.snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and p.command in ('VACUUM','ANALYZE') and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

panels.title: Top 50 Tablo — Dead Tuple Oranı (cross-instance)
panels.description: Fleet'teki en fazla bloat'lı tablolar — instance + tablo bazında. Click → Instance Detail.

targets.rawSql: with latest as (select instance_pk, max(sample_ts) as ts from fact.pg_table_stat_delta group by instance_pk) select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, t.schemaname || '.' || t.relname as relation, t.n_live_tup_estimate as live_tup, t.n_dead_tup_estimate as dead_tup, round(100.0 * t.n_dead_tup_estimate::numeric / nullif(t.n_live_tup_estimate + t.n_dead_tup_estimate, 0), 1) as dead_pct from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t join latest l on l.instance_pk = t.instance_pk and l.ts = t.sample_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = t.instance_pk where (t.n_live_tup_estimate + t.n_dead_tup_estimate) > 1000 and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by dead_pct desc nulls last limit 50

with latest as (select instance_pk, max(snapshot_ts) as ts from fact.pg_progress_snapshot where snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' group by instance_pk) select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, p.command, p.datname, p.relname, p.phase, p.blocks_total, p.blocks_done, p.progress_pct from fact.pg_progress_snapshot p join latest l on l.instance_pk = p.instance_pk and l.ts = p.snapshot_ts join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = p.instance_pk where (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by p.command, p.relname

panels.title: Range İçi Vacuum/Analyze Sayısı (per instance)
panels.description: Seçili zaman aralığında her instance kaç autovacuum/autoanalyze çalıştırmış.

targets.rawSql: select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, sum(coalesce(t.autovacuum_count_delta, 0)) as autovac_count, sum(coalesce(t.autoanalyze_count_delta, 0)) as autoanalyze_count, sum(coalesce(t.vacuum_count_delta, 0)) as manual_vac_count, sum(coalesce(t.analyze_count_delta, 0)) as manual_analyze_count from fact.pg_table_stat_delta t join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = t.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(t.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) group by i.instance_pk, i.display_name order by autovac_count desc nulls last
